publicSite.homeTitle: Long trails, mountain weather, and stories worth keeping.
publicSite.homeDescription: A warm landing page for hikes, trips, maps, and the kind of trail memories that stay with you after the boots are off.
publicSite.homeFeatureTextOne: An editorial section for lectures, school talks, or public events built from the same journey archive.
publicSite.homeFeatureTitleTwo: Real hikes, real weather, real distance
publicSite.homeFeatureTextTwo: Maps, route lines, photos, and day-by-day notes can live together without feeling like an admin export.
publicSite.homeFeatureTextThree: A homepage that feels personal first, while still leading visitors deeper into trips and activities.
publicSite.homeTripsTitle: A visual index for journeys, crossings, and long walks.
publicSite.homeTripOneMeta: High winds, long climbs, late light.
publicSite.homeQuote: Slow travel, clear maps, and a homepage that feels like a field notebook instead of a dashboard.
publicSite.tripListPageDescription: Public trip pages generated from backend data.
publicSite.tripTemplateDescription: This detail page is intentionally sparse for now. Replace the placeholder sections with the final trip presentation later.
publicSite.gpxHelp: Upload a GPX track to fill the planned path polyline automatically.
publicSite.gpxRequired: Select a GPX file to upload.
publicSite.saveTripFirstForGpx: Save the trip first before uploading a GPX file.
publicSite.gpxCompress: Compress points using the summary-polyline downsampling
publicSite.sectionPlaceholder: Placeholder content for the final public trip page.
publicSite.contentEmpty: This trip does not have any published content yet.

login.title: Admin login
login.subtitle: Sign in with Google to access admin pages.

adminHome.title: Administration
adminHome.subtitle: Choose a section to manage application access or edit trip content.
adminHome.usersDescription: Review which Google accounts can access the administration area.
adminHome.siteDescription: Edit homepage hero content and the main image used on the public index page.
adminHome.tripsDescription: Create and edit trip records, planning fields, and BlockNote content.
adminHome.stravaDescription: Connect one Strava account and verify the integration by loading recent activities.
adminHome.webpushrDescription: Send manual push notifications and inspect basic Webpushr statistics.
adminHome.activitiesDescription: Manage Strava-linked activities and their map data.
adminHome.galleryDescription: Upload reusable images for BlockNote and copy public image URLs.

adminUsers.title: Admin Users
adminUsers.subtitle: Authorized Google accounts that can access administration pages.

gallery.title: Global Image Gallery
gallery.description: Upload reusable JPG or PNG images to Firebase Storage. Use copied URLs inside BlockNote image blocks.
gallery.filesHelp: Supported formats: JPG and PNG. You can select multiple files.
gallery.filesRequired: Select at least one image to upload.
gallery.resizeInvalid: Resize width and height must be positive integers.
gallery.empty: No images in the gallery yet.

globalContent.title: Site Content
globalContent.description: Manage the main homepage headline, BlockNote text, and the hero image.
globalContent.imageDescription: Upload the main image used in the homepage hero. The current bundled image stays as fallback.
globalContent.imageEmpty: No custom hero image uploaded yet. The bundled fallback image is still used on the homepage.
globalContent.resizeInvalid: Resize width and height must be positive integers.

activities.title: Activities
activities.emptyPublic: No activities are linked to this trip yet.
activities.noTrips: Create a trip first before managing activities.
activities.selectPrompt: Select or create an activity to begin editing.
activities.name: Activity name
activities.descriptionHelp: Optional BlockNote description stored as JSONB.
activities.gpxHelp: Upload a GPX track to generate polyline and summary polyline automatically.
activities.gpxRequired: Select a GPX file to upload.
activities.saveActivityFirstForGpx: Save the activity first before uploading a GPX file.
activities.invalidNumber: Numeric fields must contain valid non-negative values.

strava.title: Strava Connection
strava.description: Authorize one Strava account for the application and verify the connection by loading recent activities.
strava.tripRequired: Select a trip before importing a Strava activity.
strava.recentActivitiesDescription: Latest activities from the connected Strava account.
strava.emptyActivities: No recent Strava activities were returned.
strava.authorizationMissing: The Strava connection could not be started.

webpushr.title: Webpushr Notifications
webpushr.description: Manual push notifications for current subscribers plus basic statistics returned by the Webpushr API.
webpushr.sendDescription: Compose a push notification and send it to all current subscribers.
webpushr.validationError: Title, message, and target URL are required.
webpushr.statsDescription: Configuration state and subscriber counts returned by Webpushr.
webpushr.campaignDescription: Check delivery metrics for a Webpushr campaign ID.

activityPhotos.title: Activity Photos
activityPhotos.description: Upload JPG or PNG photos for this activity, copy their URLs, and adjust the display order.
activityPhotos.empty: No photos uploaded for this activity yet.
activityPhotos.emptyTrip: No activity photos are available for this trip yet.
activityPhotos.saveActivityFirst: Save the activity first before uploading photos.
activityPhotos.filesHelp: Supported formats: JPG and PNG. You can select multiple files.
activityPhotos.filesRequired: Select at least one photo to upload.
activityPhotos.resizeInvalid: Resize width and height must be positive integers.

comments.emptyTrip: No comments for this trip yet.
comments.emptyActivity: No comments for this activity yet.
comments.name: Name
comments.validationError: Name and comment text are required.

tripImages.title: Trip Images
tripImages.description: Upload JPG or PNG images for this trip, reorder them, and use them on the homepage or trip pages.
tripImages.empty: No images uploaded for this trip yet.
tripImages.saveTripFirst: Save the trip first before uploading images.
tripImages.filesHelp: Supported formats: JPG and PNG. You can select multiple files.
tripImages.filesRequired: Select at least one image to upload.
tripImages.resizeInvalid: Resize width and height must be positive integers.

trips.selectPrompt: Select or create a trip to begin editing.
trips.storyDescription: The trip body is stored as BlockNote JSON in the trip content field.
